_comment: Iceberg Bronze table specification — Brain Platform (I-E02). This spec is non-retrofittable; partition spec and schema evolution policy are fixed at table creation. Source of truth for both local (Iceberg REST catalog — apache/iceberg-rest-fixture) and production (AWS Glue) table registration.

fields.name: event_id
fields.doc: Idempotency key component. Part of MERGE predicate: (brand_id, event_id).

fields.name: brand_id
fields.doc: Tenant key. Partition bucket key. Row isolation anchor.

fields.name: ingested_at
fields.doc: Collector spool time (UTC). Monotonically increasing; used for watermark.

fields.name: event_type
fields.doc: Semantic event type — page_view, order_placed, etc.

fields.name: correlation_id
fields.doc: Distributed trace ID — propagated from collector.

fields.name: partition_key
fields.doc: brand_id:event_id — derived, stored for log correlation.

fields.name: payload
fields.doc: JSON-encoded event body. No raw PII (I-S02).

fields.name: processing_flags
fields.doc: Optional JSON metadata set by stream-worker (dedup status, watermark lag). Null on first write.

fields.name: collector_version
fields.doc: Optional collector deployment version. Nullable — schema-evolution safe field.

partition_spec._comment: Non-retrofittable. bucket(brand_id) + days(occurred_at). brand_id first for tenant-scoped scan pruning. bucket(16) gives ~16 brand shards — increase N via partition evolution (additive) when tenant count grows beyond 100.

sort_order._comment: Within each partition: brand_id ASC then occurred_at ASC — locality for per-brand time-range scans.

properties._comment_retention: 24-month rolling retention. Snapshot expiry + orphan cleanup run weekly via Argo job (M1). Iceberg snapshot retention properties are set here and enforced by the maintenance job.
properties._comment_isolation: Per-brand S3 prefix isolation. ObjectStore path: warehouse/brand_id={brand_id}/year=YYYY/month=MM/day=DD/. KMS DEK per brand applied at the S3 bucket level via per-brand prefix + IRSA policy (NN-5, ADR-005).
